title: erinus humilis
intro: Erinus humilis, also known as the dwarf toadflax, is a low-growing perennial herb native to Europe. This plant is used in herbal medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Erinus humilis include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Erinus humilis can be prepared as an infusion by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water, or as a tincture by extracting the active compounds with a solvent like ethanol.
